prompts.name: Cat Companion
prompts.text: Add a cat companion that interacts naturally with the subject, sitting nearby, looking up, or resting comfortably.

prompts.name: Dog Companion
prompts.text: Add a dog companion with friendly body language, natural scale, and warm emotional connection to the subject.

prompts.name: Fox Companion
prompts.text: Add a fox companion with graceful posture, alert expression, and subtle fantasy or woodland mood.

prompts.name: Bird on Hand
prompts.text: Place a small bird perched on the subject's hand or shoulder with delicate balance and soft detail.

prompts.name: Butterfly Companions
prompts.text: Add butterflies around the subject, creating gentle movement, color, and delicate atmosphere.

prompts.name: Spirit Wisp Companion
prompts.text: Add a small glowing spirit wisp near the subject with soft light and friendly magical presence.

prompts.name: Robot Pet Companion
prompts.text: Add a small robot pet with clean mechanical design, glowing eyes, and friendly companion behavior.

prompts.name: Tiny Dragon Companion
prompts.text: Add a tiny dragon companion with expressive eyes, detailed scales, and curious body language.

prompts.name: Plush Companion
prompts.text: Add a soft plush companion held by the subject or placed nearby, with cozy fabric texture.

prompts.name: Magical Familiar
prompts.text: Add a magical familiar that feels bonded to the subject, with subtle glow, intelligent eyes, and clear personality.

prompts.name: Fairy Companion
prompts.text: Add a small fairy companion with delicate wings, soft glow, and playful movement around the subject.

prompts.name: Shadow Pet
prompts.text: Add a harmless shadow-like pet creature with smoky edges, glowing eyes, and cute mysterious character.

prompts.name: Clockwork Bird
prompts.text: Add a clockwork bird companion with brass wings, tiny gears, and delicate mechanical charm.

prompts.name: Plant Sprite Companion
prompts.text: Add a plant sprite companion with leafy details, tiny body, and cheerful natural energy.

prompts.name: Slime Pet
prompts.text: Add a cute slime pet with glossy surface, simple expression, and playful round shape.
